item.title: TechTalk: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
item.description: Overview This workshop covered the basics of cloud computing, focusing on practical deployment strategies for student projects. Key Takeaways VMs vs Containers vs Serverless Basic AWS services (EC2, S3) Deployment pipelines

item.title: Cybersecurity 101: Web App Vulnerabilities
item.description: Overview A hands-on session where students learned about the OWASP Top 10 and practiced attacking a deliberately vulnerable web application. Key Takeaways How XSS works in modern single-page apps SQL injection prevention techniques Importance of secure headers

item.title: System Design: Scaling to 1M Users
item.description: Overview An advanced session on system design principles, walking through the architecture of a hypothetical social media platform scaling to 1 million active users. Key Takeaways Horizontal vs Vertical scaling Caching strategies (Redis, Memcached) Database sharding and replication

item.title: Intro to Machine Learning Models
item.description: Overview A beginner-friendly workshop introducing the fundamental concepts of machine learning, focusing on linear regression and random forests. Key Takeaways Training vs Testing data Evaluating model accuracy Practical implementation using Python and scikit-learn
